title: Airtable View
description: An Airtable view provides a filtered, sorted, and formatted perspective on the records in a table. Views control which fields are visible, how records are ordered, and which records meet the view's filter criteria.

id.description: The unique identifier for the view. View IDs always start with the 'viw' prefix.

name.description: The display name of the view.

type.description: The type of view, which determines the layout and interaction model.

personalForUserId.description: If set, this is a personal view visible only to the specified user. Null indicates a shared view.

visibleFieldIds.description: The IDs of fields visible in this view, in display order. Only included when explicitly requested via the include parameter.
